node.text: James offered support and encouragement to find the right non-profit organization that aligns with John's values and passion for programming.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked with programming languages") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: James was glad to hear from John and excited to learn about the impact of the software tool John created for the charitable foundation.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked with programming languages") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: James asked about the motivation behind John's creation of the software tool for the foundation.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked with programming languages") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: James worked on a programming project combining gaming with programming, creating a virtual world inspired by Witcher 3 with a game character he designed.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked with programming languages") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: James's apartment lost power three days ago, disrupting his game progress as he forgot to save.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked with programming languages") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.89)

node.text: James finished a Unity strategy game that he put a lot of time and effort into.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked with programming languages") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.71)

node.text: James got the idea for the virtual world from a stranger he saw while walking his dogs and found inspiring.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "worked with programming languages") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.65)

node.text: James encouraged John to continue using his skills and passions for making a difference.
James suggested meeting at Starbucks for coffee with John.
James found the process of creating the game challenging, especially balancing mechanics and fairness.
